keyspaces.description: Register each llm-worker worker under /services/llm-worker/ as a leased key (value host:port) with a TTL keepalive, so listeners discover the live worker set.

history.description: Register each llm-worker worker under /services/llm-worker/ as a leased key (value host:port) with a TTL keepalive, so listeners discover the live worker set.

listeners.description: Watch /services/llm-worker/ and keep a live in-memory map of llm-worker workers (worker id -> host:port), updated by pushed etcd events.

history.description: Watch /services/llm-worker/ and keep a live in-memory map of llm-worker workers (worker id -> host:port), updated by pushed etcd events.

keyspaces.description: Register each usr-msg-consumer worker under /services/usr-msg-consumer/ as a leased key (value host:port) with a TTL keepalive, so listeners discover the live worker set.

history.description: Register each usr-msg-consumer worker under /services/usr-msg-consumer/ as a leased key (value host:port) with a TTL keepalive, so listeners discover the live worker set.

listeners.description: Watch /services/usr-msg-consumer/ and keep a live in-memory map of usr-msg-consumer workers (worker id -> host:port), updated by pushed etcd events.

history.description: Watch /services/usr-msg-consumer/ and keep a live in-memory map of usr-msg-consumer workers (worker id -> host:port), updated by pushed etcd events.

keyspaces.name: app-settings
keyspaces.description: Config keyspace /config/app-settings/ — key/value settings pushed live to watching services.

history.description: Config keyspace /config/app-settings/ — key/value settings pushed live to watching services.

listeners.description: Watch /config/app-settings/ and keep a live in-memory config map (key -> value), updated by pushed etcd events.

history.description: Watch /config/app-settings/ and keep a live in-memory config map (key -> value), updated by pushed etcd events.
